---
title: "Gem in Eyes — an introduction"
date: "2026-05-09"
description: "A small light in a deep room. A cube of stone with five lit corners and one quiet pocket at the center. Lik, Ton, Ren, Nif, Eye."
categories: [game, gem-in-eyes, bobble]
---

A small light in a deep room. A cube of stone with five lit corners and one quiet pocket at the center. You hum, and the room hums back. Five gods — **Lik**, **Ton**, **Ren**, **Nif**, **Eye** — keep the corners lit.

This piece is a self-contained HTML file. Download it and open it locally in any browser.

```{=html}
<p style="margin: 2em 0;">
<a href="../gem-in-eyes-intro.html" download="gem-in-eyes-intro.html"
   style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.7em 1.4em; border: 1px solid currentColor; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">
   ⬇ &nbsp; Download HTML
</a>
&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="../gem-in-eyes-intro.html" style="opacity: 0.7;">or open in browser →</a>
</p>
```
